title: AI for Science - Models, Agents & Tools for Researchers
description: Three curated indexes for finding biological foundation models, autonomous science agents, and privacy-aware coding and data tools.
rights: Portal catalog data, metadata, and original documentation are licensed under CC BY 4.0; portal maintenance code is MIT. Child-catalog external resources, logos, and trademarks retain their own terms. IMG CAS is affiliation only, not publisher or endorsement.

affiliation.name: Institute of Molecular Genetics of the Czech Academy of Sciences
Institute of Molecular Genetics of the Czech Academy of Sciences

catalogs.title: Biological Foundation Models - Researcher Index
catalogs.description: Foundation models, platforms, and benchmarks for biological sequences, structures, molecules, cells, tissue, and multimodal biology.

catalogs.title: Autonomous Science Agents - Researcher Index
catalogs.description: Scientific agents, self-driving laboratories, simulation systems, and evaluation harnesses with explicit autonomy and access labels.

catalogs.title: AI Coding and Data Agents for Researchers
catalogs.description: Privacy-first coding and data-analysis agents organized around data sensitivity, deployment control, and research use.

related_resources.title: Alphafoldology
related_resources.relationship: companion resource for the Biological Foundation Models index
related_resources.description: Interactive genealogy and directory of the AlphaFold and AI structural-biology ecosystem.
related_resources.access_note: Public website and source-visible repository; no explicit reuse licence confirmed.

related_resources.title: ELIXIR-CZ Services
related_resources.description: Directory of life-science tools, databases, computing, and storage services provided through ELIXIR-CZ partner institutions.
related_resources.access_note: Public directory; individual services range from open access to authenticated access and retain their own access policies and terms.
